pageTitle: Is the court hearing in the next 14 days?
caption: Make an application
heading: Is the court hearing in the next 14 days?
question: Is the court hearing in the next 14 days?
hintText: This will affect the fee you will pay. You do not need to pay a fee if your court hearing is (at least) 14 days away.

errors.typeOfApplication: You must select whether the court hearing is in the next 14 days
